JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.title: Inner Star Map
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.description:
Jiang Xiao Exclusive. Core Relic. 
 Gain Skill Points upon winning a battle (Normal/Event +1250, Elite +2500, Boss +5000). 
 Currently have [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Upon obtaining this relic, automatically gain Star Map, Star Skill Quality, and Star Power Level relics.)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.flavor: A miraculous star map existing within the mind, the starting point of Jiang Xiao's path as a toxic healer.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.title: Inner Star Map+
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.descrip:
Jiang Xiao Exclusive. Core Relic. 
 Gain Skill Points upon winning a battle (Normal/Event +2500, Elite +5000, Boss +10000). 
 Currently have [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Upon obtaining this relic, automatically gain Star Map, Star Skill Quality, and Star Power Level relics.)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.flavor: A miraculous star map existing within the mind, the starting point of Jiang Xiao's path as a toxic healer.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.title: Star Power Level
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.descriptio:
Current Star Power Level: [gold]{level:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6):Stardust|Nebula|Galaxy|Star Sea|Star Sky|Star End}[/gold]. 
 Gain [gold]{energy}[/gold] additional Energy.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.flavor: Star power ebbs and flows like the tide; every star lit represents a qualitative leap.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.title: Star Skill Quality
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.flavor: Quality determines the purity of star power. From Bronze to Solar, it is the chasm between mortals and gods.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.title: Basic Arts
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.description:
Records your combat training. When playing a card of the corresponding type, the points for that category +1. Every [gold]10[/gold] points increases the Rank by [gold]1[/gold].

Unarmed Combat: Rank [gold]{UnarmedR}[/gold] ({UnarmedP}/60)
Xia Style Blade: Rank [gold]{BladeR}[/gold] ({BladeP}/60)
Archery Mastery: Rank [gold]{BowR}[/gold] ({BowP}/60)
Dagger Mastery: Rank [gold]{DaggerR}[/gold] ({DaggerP}/60)
Halberd Mastery: Rank [gold]{HalberdR}[/gold] ({HalberdP}/60)
Combat Knife Mastery: Rank [gold]{CombatKnifeR}[/gold] ({CombatKnifeP}/60)
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.flavor: Every session of training and every drop of sweat is a foundation stone for reaching the pinnacle.
